basic.name: Bharath M N
basic.tagline: Software Engineer (SDE) with 4+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications and distributed systems.
basic.summary:
Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications and distributed systems. Strong expertise in Node.js, Microservices Architecture, and performance optimization. Proficient in TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, and Astro.js, with hands-on experience delivering maintainable, production-ready systems across frontend and backend.

Experienced in building modern SaaS products, scalable APIs, responsive UI systems, and CI/CD-driven deployment pipelines. Comfortable working in Agile product teams and collaborating across engineering, design, and QA.

experience.description: Built and optimized scalable React.js and Next.js applications with reusable component architecture. Developed instant messaging systems and multi-repository platform workflows. Integrated REST and GraphQL APIs for real-time and dynamic application experiences. Contributed to CI/CD automation using GitLab and Azure DevOps pipelines. Improved frontend performance, maintainability, and deployment workflows.

Delivered full-stack Next.js applications with responsive React-based interfaces. Integrated REST APIs to support dynamic business workflows and user experiences. Improved SEO performance through metadata optimization and schema markup implementation. Collaborated closely with backend teams working on Python and Django APIs.

Developed high-performance Next.js applications with Server-Side Rendering (SSR). Built responsive UI systems using Tailwind CSS and reusable frontend components. Implemented API routes, authentication systems, and backend workflows using Node.js. Worked on scalable frontend architecture and deployment optimization.

Built scalable and responsive frontend interfaces using JavaScript, TypeScript, and React.js. Implemented state management using Redux and Context API. Integrated APIs and optimized UI rendering for real-time user experiences. Collaborated with teams to deliver maintainable and production-ready features.
